description_long: This is a small, fixed-wing airplane with a classic biplane configuration, featuring two sets of straight wings stacked one above the other. The fuselage is compact and cylindrical, with a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit that appears to accommodate a single pilot. The airplane is equipped with a conventional tail assembly, including a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear is fixed and consists of two main wheels and a small tail wheel, typical of taildragger aircraft. The exterior is primarily painted in shades of blue and white, with a glossy finish that reflects light. The engine is mounted at the nose, and the propeller is clearly visible at the front of the aircraft.
description: A small, blue-and-white biplane with a forward cockpit, fixed taildragger landing gear, and a nose-mounted propeller engine. The airplane features a glossy finish and a classic, compact design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose-mounted propeller, forward cockpit, and the stacked biplane wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the compact fuselage, fixed main and tail landing gear, and the vertical stabilizer at the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, as well as the biplane wing structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cockpit placement, fixed landing gear, and the overall biplane profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing biplane configuration with two straight, parallel wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a front propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
